description: A maintenance planner develops a high-level plan for a major turnaround (shutdown for maintenance) of the Fluid Catalytic Cracker (FCC) unit.

nodes.task_description: Define the scope of the turnaround by compiling a list of all planned maintenance, inspection, and capital project jobs.

expected_outcome.value: A comprehensive work scope list for the turnaround is created.

nodes.task_description: Develop a high-level schedule for the turnaround, including shutdown, execution, and startup phases.

expected_outcome.value: A master schedule with key milestones is generated.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the total budget for the turnaround, including labor, materials, and contractor costs.

expected_outcome.value: A preliminary budget for the turnaround is calculated and submitted for approval.
